title: phyllanthus ruber
intro: Phyllanthus ruber, also known as Red Fleabane or Red Phyllanthus, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Phyllanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver function. The leaves and stems of Phyllanthus ruber are often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
